roles.desc: Independent AI strategy and product advisory for startups and enterprises building with AI infrastructure: product strategy, agent workflow design, and go-to-market.

Founded and shipped the privacy-preserving compute layer for AI agents: a three-sided GPU marketplace for verifiable, trustless inference at scale. Grew it from a single Filecoin smart-contract proof of concept to globally deployed, open-source infrastructure across thousands of active nodes. Launched IncentiveNet (Jun 2024), structured a Dell enterprise partnership, and open-sourced the full codebase.

Led developer experience and go-to-market for the Filecoin Virtual Machine, one of the largest smart-contract platform launches in Web3. Assembled the DX team, owned the six-month pre-launch roadmap, ran the grants programme, and led the Space Warp hackathon (1,000+ hackers, 276 submissions).

Greenfield ML/IoT classified research project. Designed and built a distributed ML and IoT system for real-time AI analytics on mass incoming sensor data, owning architecture, security, DevOps and data pipeline simultaneously.

Led developer advocacy across ANZ for IBM Cloud, Kubernetes, Watson AI and blockchain. Built IBM Developer Meetups ANZ, co-organised the Call For Code hackathons, co-hosted the Tech Jam podcast, and ran client enablement across the APAC partner ecosystem.

Primary front-end engineer on Accenture's AIOps flagship product, delivering customised automated business solutions to global enterprise clients. Stack: React, Node, Express, MongoDB, Splunk, Docker, Jenkins CI/CD, AWS.

education.note: New Colombo Plan Scholarship, Robotics, China

recognition: Telstra Innovation Hackathon, 1st Runners Up & Smart Logistics Winner (2021)
